Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers with divergent risk profiles. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 95.4, demonstrating consistent momentum across all timeframes—posting 1446.92% over 10 years while outperforming SPY by 1236.49% over the same period, with all four moving averages in bullish alignment. CLMT follows closely with dominant recent returns (171.64% in 1 year, 591.95% in 5 years) but shows a critical weakness: its 10-year return collapsed to 172.04% and trails SPY by -38.39% over a decade, suggesting the rally is a recent phenomenon rather than a secular trend. The ratio_passes metric indicates both stocks exceed 3 of 5 acceleration thresholds, but CLMT's ratio_10y_5y of just 0.29 signals deceleration that contradicts the long-term momentum mandate of this dashboard. LINC's "strong_buy" flag combined with normal volatility and zero pullback signals suggests cleaner technical positioning compared to CLMT's profile.
